Member Portal

Join the Global MREA Network

Connect with institutional capital, access exclusive deal flow, and advance your career in global real estate.

Membership Options

Individual Professional

$299/year
  • Access to member directory
  • Chapter event participation
  • Deal Room networking
  • MWIRE community access
  • Professional development resources

Corporate Partner

$1,499/year
  • All Individual benefits
  • Priority deal flow access
  • Corporate branding on chapter sites
  • Dedicated account management
  • Executive networking events

Institutional Investor

Custom
  • All Corporate benefits
  • Direct family office connections
  • Exclusive investment opportunities
  • Global market intelligence
  • VIP event invitations

Why Join MREA?

Global Network

Connect with 15,000+ professionals across 52 chapters worldwide.

Deal Flow Access

Exclusive opportunities in high-capital development and investment.

Professional Development

Access to research, advocacy, and leadership programs.

Community Impact

Support initiatives that advance our communities globally.

MREA
Global Network

A 501(c)(6) non-profit professional trade association dedicated to empowering Muslim real estate professionals worldwide through ethical leadership, advocacy, and community.

© 2026 Muslim Real Estate Association. All rights reserved.

MREA is a 501(c)(6) non-profit trade association. Not a securities dealer or investment advisor.
